  simp [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab]

  intro d hd
  have h1 : d ∣ 21 * n + 4 := hd.1
  have h2 : d ∣ 14 * n + 3 := hd.2
  have h3 : d ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) := Nat.dvd_sub' (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 3 h2) (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 2 h1)
  simp at h3
  have h4 : d ∣ 1 := by simpa using h3
  exact Nat.dvd_one.mp h4

rw [Nat.gcd_comm]
  have h₁ : (14 * n + 3).gcd (21 * n + 4) = (14 * n + 3).gcd (21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3)) := by
    rw [Nat.gcd_rec]
  rw [h₁]
  norm_num
  have h₂ : (14 * n + 3).gcd (7 * n + 1) = (7 * n + 1).gcd ((14 * n + 3) % (7 * n + 1)) := by
    rw [Nat.gcd_rec]
  rw [h₂]
  norm_num
  have h₃ : (7 * n + 1).gcd 1 = 1 := by
    simp
  exact h₃
